data.body: 😂😂🤦🏽‍♂️😂 Yeah, Claude is a website… same way a car is ‘just metal and wheels.’ Technically true, but also missing the point a bit. data.body:
【ANNOUNCEMENT】
With four weeks left before the #MIKUEXPO2026 concert on May 13 at Hamilton, ON, these are the freebies I'll be handing out that day:

1. Handheld fans 
These are roughly 21cm x 27cm in size, with the graphics measuring 18cm x 15.5cm (7"x5"). Two styles available, 100x2=200 total.
data.author: did:plc:cvqyjfof3kgmx3bec6yzmex2

data.body:
2. Social Media Style Laminated Cards
Primarily spurred by CFM charging CAD$22 per card (plus minimum CAD$36 shipping), these cards measure 6.3cm x 10.1cm (standard 2"x3.5" business card size plus 5-6mm laminate border) with a transparent centre. 100 cards TOTAL. Rares = Gumi, Gakupo, Nendo Miku.
data.author: did:plc:cvqyjfof3kgmx3bec6yzmex2

data.body:
3. Name cards 
If you've seen my uploads on twitter/x (some of these on bsky as well), that's where the images are sourced. I've dropped my x username as it's partially inactive.
15 styles, 360 cards total.

One freebie MAX per person (handheld fan OR SNS card OR name card).
data.author: did:plc:cvqyjfof3kgmx3bec6yzmex2

data.body:
To find me on May 13:
I've been using a hand sewn bag (and waist straps!) with clear vinyl sides for Japan Festival 2024 and 2025. Since the last JFes I've made changes to the bag so it doubles as an ita bag, paired with two beambox electronic badges; that's my primary bag.

data.body:

Yes, I'll be driving EARLY to Hamilton; the parking situation around TD Coliseum is gnarly to put it mildly.

data.body:
Unlike fifty years ago, Daniel leaned into the care instead of flinching away. To be fair, he probably would have back then too, if death hadn't been so imminent.

At first, he didn't pay attention to the words that his maker was saying. He was just enjoying being fussed over. He wouldn't ━
data.author: did:plc:qruhudnerob7pjd4hnnyjkyf

data.body:
━ ever admit it, but it was... really nice to have someone care that he was a mess.

But once the words registered? He responded by turning and biting Armand's hand. It wasn't a good spot for a drink, he couldn't really dig his fangs in, but that wasn't the point.

"Yeah, you deserve it."
